_note: Kansas City HQ data. Source: kansascityfwc26.com, Fox Sports, FIFA.

venue.name: Kansas City Stadium
venue.notes: Home of the Kansas City Chiefs. Renamed 'Kansas City Stadium' for the World Cup. One of the loudest stadiums in the world on a full crowd day.
venue.parkingNote: Arrowhead's massive parking lots available for WC matches — verify specific lots and pricing with kansascityfwc26.com. Rideshare also available.

transit.recommended: Official WC Game Day Shuttles from Crown Center / Union Station and Power & Light District
lines: Shuttle Bus — Crown Center to Arrowhead
Shuttle Bus — Power & Light District to Arrowhead
KC Streetcar to Union Station, then shuttle
tips: KC Streetcar runs from River Market to Union Station (free). Connect to game-day shuttles at Union Station.
Shuttles depart 2.5 hrs before kickoff and run for 90 min after final whistle.
Driving is feasible — Arrowhead has large lots but expect 45–60 min exit delays post-match.
Rideshare surge pricing will be significant post-match — consider pre-scheduling your pickup.
transit.parking: Lots 1-9 accessible. Pre-purchase through official WC channels. Typically $35–50/match.
transit.rideshare: Designated rideshare pickup near Gate 4. Heavy surge expected — book in advance.

fanZones.name: Power & Light FIFA Fan Festival
fanZones.notes: Official FIFA fan zone in KC's premier entertainment district. Giant screens, live music, food vendors, interactive activations. Epicenter of World Cup energy in Kansas City.

fanZones.name: Crown Center Watch Party Hub
fanZones.notes: Outdoor screening area. Also the primary shuttle departure point to Arrowhead.

fanZones.name: Westport World Cup Watch Parties
fanZones.notes: Multiple Westport bars will host outdoor screenings and parties. Kansas City's most famous bar district.

preGame.name: Power & Light District
preGame.notes: The main World Cup pre-game hub for KC. Multiple bars and restaurants. Start here, take the official shuttle.

preGame.name: Westport
preGame.notes: KC's historic bar strip. Joe's KC BBQ nearby. Best neighborhood energy in the city on match days.

preGame.name: Joe's Kansas City Bar-B-Que
preGame.notes: One of the best BBQ spots in America. The Z-Man sandwich is a must. Expect lines — go early.

preGame.name: Q39 BBQ
preGame.notes: Competition-style BBQ with a full bar. Great for groups. Reservations recommended on match days.

preGame.name: Arrowhead Parking Lots (Tailgate)
preGame.notes: Chiefs tailgate culture is world-class. Expect full World Cup tailgate setups in the parking lots 3+ hours before kickoff.

cityEnergyForecast.crowdNote: Argentina vs Algeria — defending champs in Kansas City. Messi. Night kickoff. Arrowhead will be electric.
Ecuador vs Curaçao — Group E match. Curaçao's historic debut. Smaller crowd but fun atmosphere.
Tunisia vs Netherlands — Dutch fans travel in numbers. Strong European presence in KC.
Algeria vs Austria — Group J stakes. Algeria fans passionate. Night kickoff at 9pm CT.
Round of 32 — Knockout soccer returns to Arrowhead. Elimination stakes. City fully engaged.
Quarterfinal — Elite 8 of the World Cup. Top 8 teams on earth. One of the greatest sporting events Kansas City will ever host.

transitPain.label: Very High
transitPain.note: Argentina vs Algeria — expect max Argentina fan attendance. Tuesday night, 8pm. Heavy post-match traffic.
tips: Take the official shuttle from Power & Light — do not drive
Arrive at shuttle stop 75 min before kickoff
Post-match: Arrowhead exit is always congested — stay 30 min post-final whistle

transitPain.label: Moderate
transitPain.note: Ecuador vs Curaçao — Saturday evening, 7pm. Lighter crowd than Argentina match.
tips: Saturday makes driving more feasible — less weekday commute overlap
Power & Light shuttle still recommended for post-match ease
Curaçao fans are small in number — expect strong Ecuador presence

transitPain.label: High
transitPain.note: Tunisia vs Netherlands — Dutch fans are notorious travelers. Expect full Arrowhead. Thursday evening.
tips: Netherlands fans will fill Power & Light from noon
Take shuttle — Dutch fans will clog driving routes
Orange everywhere — embrace it

transitPain.label: High
transitPain.note: Algeria vs Austria — late Saturday night kickoff (9pm). Expect a lively post-midnight scene in Power & Light.
tips: Late kickoff means post-match is very late — plan your night accordingly
Saturday means more people staying in KC overnight
Power & Light district will be lively until 2am post-match

transitPain.label: Very High
transitPain.note: Round of 32 — July 4th weekend. Knockout stakes PLUS holiday weekend. Plan way ahead.
tips: July 4th weekend — KC will be packed regardless of the match
Book shuttles and accommodation early
Combine fireworks and soccer into one epic KC weekend

transitPain.label: Very High
transitPain.note: Quarterfinal — Elite 8 of the World Cup. Top 8 teams alive. Do not drive. Do not rush.
tips: This is the biggest sporting event in Kansas City history since the Chiefs Super Bowl
Book everything in advance — hotels, shuttles, restaurants
Stay near Power & Light post-match — it will be the most electric night KC has ever seen

shouldIGoScores.label: Don't miss it
shouldIGoScores.summary: Argentina vs Algeria at Arrowhead on a Tuesday night. Messi, defending champs, African dark horses. Night soccer under the lights at Arrowhead.

shouldIGoScores.label: Consider
shouldIGoScores.summary: Ecuador vs Curaçao — solid group stage match. Curaçao's historic debut makes this worth attending for the occasion, if not the matchup.

shouldIGoScores.label: Go
shouldIGoScores.summary: Netherlands in Kansas City. Dutch fans pack every tournament. Arrowhead in orange will be a visual spectacle.

shouldIGoScores.label: Go
shouldIGoScores.summary: Algeria vs Austria at 9pm — late-night KC soccer. High stakes for Group J. Night game at Arrowhead.

shouldIGoScores.label: Don't miss it
shouldIGoScores.summary: Knockout soccer on July 4th weekend at Arrowhead. The two things Kansas City does best: sports and holidays.

shouldIGoScores.label: Once in a lifetime
shouldIGoScores.summary: A World Cup Quarterfinal at Arrowhead Stadium. Elite 8 on earth. This is the greatest sporting event Kansas City will ever host.
